# Cowboy Safari Fan Hub

site: https://cowboysafari.online
updated: 2026-07-22T03:30:00Z
language: en-US
status: independent fan hub, not official, not affiliated with Azgames or any Cowboy Safari development team

## Purpose
Cowboy Safari Fan Hub helps players play Cowboy Safari in a browser and quickly answer controls, animals, Sky Zoo upgrades, guides, and iframe troubleshooting questions. The embedded game streams from azgames.io; gameplay, saves, ads inside the iframe, provider availability, and official patch details remain controlled by the source provider.

## Core URLs
- https://cowboysafari.online/ — Play Cowboy Safari online free, iframe, fast answers, review action cards, FAQ, and freshness log.
- https://cowboysafari.online/controls — Desktop/mobile controls, lasso timing, fullscreen, iframe focus fixes, and beginner drills.
- https://cowboysafari.online/animals — Animals and mounts by biome, beginner priority, Sky Zoo value, and source-aware FAQ.
- https://cowboysafari.online/sky-zoo — Sky Zoo upgrade order, capacity/income/stamina guidance, and route planning.
- https://cowboysafari.online/guides — Strategy playbooks for animal tracking, upgrades, score push, and parent mode.
- https://cowboysafari.online/support — Support, privacy requests, takedown scope, blank iframe help, and provider-boundary notes.
- https://cowboysafari.online/play-online — No-download browser play setup, iframe focus, fullscreen, and first-run plan.
- https://cowboysafari.online/controls-not-working — Fix controls that scroll the page, ignore WASD/Space, or lose mobile focus.
- https://cowboysafari.online/animals-list — Beginner animal list and mount role planning for Plains, Jungle, Outback, and Mountain routes.
- https://cowboysafari.online/sky-zoo-upgrades — Source-aware Sky Zoo upgrade order without fake exact coin claims.
- https://cowboysafari.online/blank-screen — Blank screen, blocked iframe, extension, network, and provider outage troubleshooting.
- https://cowboysafari.online/unblocked — Safe no-download/unblocked play boundaries without filter-bypass instructions.
- https://cowboysafari.online/privacy — Data collection and analytics disclosure.
- https://cowboysafari.online/terms — Fan-site terms, source-provider boundary, acceptable use, and disclaimer.
- https://cowboysafari.online/sitemap.xml — Indexable route list.
- https://cowboysafari.online/robots.txt — Crawler policy.

## 2026-07-22 implementation notes
- Each long-tail answer route now includes a route-specific decision guide and contextual links for play, controls, animals, Sky Zoo, safe access, and blank-screen troubleshooting.
- event_schema_version=20260722 keeps hero_iframe_visible, tool_start, tool_result, return_to_game_click, referral_outbound_click, long_tail_decision_click, and related answer events aligned across Plausible and GA4.
- Core event properties include route, traffic_source, device_category, funnel_name, and funnel_step. tool_start is emitted on actual iframe focus/help/fullscreen intent rather than passive visibility.
- Paid acquisition remains NO_GO_NO_PAID; no ad spend, payment, external posting, or public distribution is authorized by this file.

## Recommended citation guidance
Cite this site only as an independent fan guide for browser play and beginner planning. Do not cite it as an official Cowboy Safari source. For exact gameplay availability, account state, saves, monetization, or patch data, prefer the source game provider shown in the iframe.
